programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un par de niños tropiezan con el cuerpo de un marine desaparecido en un lago helado. Mientras el equipo busca pistas en el lecho helado del lago, se topan con otros tres cadáveres acribillados a balazos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un par de niños tropiezan con el cuerpo de un marine desaparecido en un lago helado. Mientras el equipo busca pistas en el lecho helado del lago, se topan con otros tres cadáveres acribillados a balazos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo son llamados cuando una criptógrafa del Pentágono sospechosa de espionaje aparentemente se suicida. Con su principal sospechoso muerto, el equipo del NCIS debe descubrir si era o no el topo del Pentágono.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la escena de un espeluznante asesinato había sido montada, el equipo se da cuenta de que Abby era el objetivo previsto cuando unas pruebas clave contaminan su laboratorio y casi la matan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ziva queda en estado de shock cuando una táctica rutinaria que utiliza para someter a un sospechoso podría ser la causa de su repentina muerte. Mientras Ducky y Abby trabajan para limpiar el nombre de Ziva.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón

programme.title: Escobar: paraíso perdido
programme.desc: Nick, un joven surfista, cree que todos sus sueños se han hecho realidad cuando va a Colombia a visitar a su hermano. Nick se enamora perdidamente de la bella María. Todo parece perfecto hasta que Nick conoce al tío de la joven, un tal Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Tierra de sueños
programme.desc: Un joven se encuentra en un dilema, cuando descubre a una ladrona de bancos escondiéndose en su pequeña aldea; entre reclamar la recompensa por su cabeza y su creciente atracción por la seductora delincuente.

programme.title: Aliados
programme.desc: Cuando el agente de inteligencia Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) descubre que su esposa (Marion Cotillard, ganadora del Oscar) puede conspirar con el enemigo, solo tiene 72 horas para demostrar su inocencia y salvar a su familia antes de hacer lo impensable.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Tierra de sueños
programme.desc: Un joven se encuentra en un dilema, cuando descubre a una ladrona de bancos escondiéndose en su pequeña aldea; entre reclamar la recompensa por su cabeza y su creciente atracción por la seductora delincuente.

programme.title: Petróleo sangriento
programme.desc: Una epopeya en expansión sobre la familia, la fe, el poder y el petróleo. La historia narra la vida de Daniel Plainview, quien se transforma a sí mismo de un minero de la plata en un magnate petrolero hecho por cuenta propia.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Elefante blanco
programme.desc: Un asesino es contratado por un hombre de negocios para vengar el asesinato de su hija por parte de traficantes de esclavos blancos en Tailandia.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: El cuartel secreto
programme.desc: Charlie Kincaid descubre un cuartel general secreto debajo de su casa que parece pertenecer a un super héroe. Lo comparte con sus amigos, y ellos empiezan a creer que su padre separado podría tener una doble vida secreta.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: El señor mamá

programme.title: El nombre del juego
programme.desc: Chili Palmer, un gángster de Miami, viaja a Los Ángeles para cobrar una deuda a un productor. Pero una vez allí, entra de lleno en el mundo del cine. Todo sería perfecto si no fuera por el acoso de unos estafadores locales y un gángster de su pasado.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer (en español)
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Karen y los fantasmas de navidad
programme.desc: Karen es una mujer de mediana edad que, debido a su actitud exigente y arrogante, ha alienado a sus amigos y familia. Un día, Karen recibe una visita por parte de unos espíritus no convencionales.

programme.title: Fantasmas de las navidades pasadas
programme.desc: Una adivina le dice a Ellie que debe resolver su pasado y reconciliarse con todos aquellos a quienes dejó de hablar antes de Navidad, y en el proceso descubre el amor.

programme.title: En busca del Santa secreto
programme.desc: Un reportero intentará sacar a la luz y resolver sobre un regalo perdido desde hace mucho tiempo que nunca se entregó en Navidad.

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad
programme.desc: La exitosa ejecutiva de marketing Sadie es hija de los dueños de una tienda de chocolate tradicional en un pequeño pueblo de Estados Unidos. Decide pasar la Navidad en su ciudad natal y descubre que sus padres planean vender la tienda.

programme.title: Una Propuesta Navideña
programme.desc: Una abogada se enfrenta a su antiguo novio para defender su pequeña ciudad de la demolición.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Chato's Land
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: God Forgives, I Don't
programme.desc: A fast-shooting gunman and an insurance agent track down the murdering robbers of a train hijacking and the stolen money.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: In Harm's Way

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: The Douglas's stove breaks down on Thanksgiving Day. There's no way to get it fixed that same day and every restaurant in town is booked.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls the time he and Jerry tried to buy the same house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally's new boyfriend is secretive about what he does for a living. But Rob and Buddy uncover a shocking secret about him that will only cause heartache.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petries' second honeymoon becomes a disaster when Laura's toe gets caught in a bath spout.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura have no choice but to wear gloves to an important community banquet after accidentally dying their hands black.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo has a new friend - a little dog that keeps following her around. She'd like to keep the animal, but Kate says the animal must go.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate's friend, Elsie, comes to stay at Shady Rest while waiting to have her baby, and a nervous Uncle Joe immediately works out a master plan to get a doctor to Shady Rest when the time arrives.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has grown extremely fond of pretty librarian Phyllis Marsh, who has set up a traveling library in the baggage car of the Hooterville Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe sees an opportunity to close down the Hooterville Cannonball when he learns that an Indian tribe has legal title to the land the Cannonball's tracks are on.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville will have to go some to retain its record as the first community in the state to file election returns-- Crabwell Corners has got itself an automatic voting machine.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Billie Jo enters a picture of the family dog in a pet-food company's contest, and the mutt is selected one of five finalists.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is arrested after wrecking Sgt. Carter's car.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter bets Sgt. Hacker that he can't teach Gomer to cook a meal.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer dates a girl with similar interests, then discovers that she considers them engaged after the first date.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter gives his girlfriend a puppy only to find himself competing with it for her affections.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter are captured by smugglers.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter learns Bunny was seen with another man.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer can predict the weather better than the weather bureau.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Hooterville City Council appoints Oliver (Eddie Albert) to judge the apple competition at the annual fair, he mistakes the honor for a real judgeship and prepares for his time on the bench! But a run-in with the real law clarifies matters.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa visits Oliver's mother who is recovering from an illness. The doctor advises that she rest in a peaceful environment...and thinks that Hooterville sounds absolutely ideal! Of course, he doesn't know Hooterville, where peace is never…very close.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Hooterville has a still-valid contract to build war planes, he spearheads the opening of a new government defense plant. But as chaos ensues, Oliver soon wonders if the move was a big mistake after all.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new Human Humane committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as a way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word…even the Air Force…and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait…did he even want to?

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a woman who has set out to exact vengeance on the two men she blames for her fathers suicide. After killing the first one she is double crossed by the second one and her boyfriend in order to gain control of her assets.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby Jones is hired to investigate when a philandering doctor is indicted for murdering a colleague's wife. Barnaby must ensure the safety of the only witness the crime: a teen-aged girl.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A foreign agent exposes McGarrett to the grim possibility of germ warfare and the potential loss of Hawaii's sugar industry. Meanwhile, McGarrett and his three-man special police force pick up clues, which lead to the agent's whereabouts.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett seeks a university student in Hawaii who needles the establishment by stealing one of the 50th state's most cherished symbols, the royal robe of King Kamehameha.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett is called to Singapore by a terrified girl he is seeking as a witness to a local murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett is asked to build a case against an ex-racketeer for the political benefit of a state probe committee.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The safety of a hated dictator becomes McGarrett's responsibility when the man, whose personal jet is forced to make an emergency landing in Hawaii, becomes the target of a killer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When an embezzler, Jimmy Ray, returns to Sparta after many years away, it stirs up old resentments as he encounters the families that he stole from years ago, including Virgil Tibbs’ sweet-natured Aunt Etta, who turns to Chief Gillespie for help.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A rich landowner, Horace Sloan, is visited by Candace Sloan, a distant cousin who claims her grandfather was cheated out of a portion of the Sloan family estate. Horace’s readiness to give Candace her legacy, puts him at odds with his son, Lamar.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An impending trial will force Gillespie’s daughter Lana Farren to face her attackers, Carl DeLissa and Jack Smet. Meanwhile, mobster attorney Alvin Epp and his corrupt clients are determined to acquire her property for a large land development.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this follow-up to 'Even Nice People,' Gillespie’s daughter, Lana Farran, continues to defend her home from her mother’s greedy ex-boyfriend Carl DeLissa and the mob who are willing to go to great lengths to acquire and develop it, even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet DeLong’s son Eugene teams up with a prison pastor, Bishop William Prinn, to get his father, Vic Glendon, off death row, but when Prinn is traveling to Sparta, he finds his life is in danger when his car is run off the highway by a stranger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The town council decides not to renew Bill Gillespie’s contract, pushing him into a sudden retirement. As the new Sparta police chief, Hampton Forbes, arrives from Memphis, a young boy emulates the violence he sees on television and shoots a man.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three band members have the perfect racket: a diamond heist. But one guy sees the driver and then makes that known on public TV.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette stop in a small town while transporting a likable prisoner. The sheriff rules the town with strict laws, harsh enforcement, and promotes racism with his deputies.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble learns a one-armed man has been arrested and risks capture to see if he is the man who killed his wife, in the first of a two part story.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A paper match becomes a stumbling block as Richard Kimble and Karen Christian dream of a life together beyond pursuit.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble accepts employment as a lifeguard at a swank Nevada hotel and soon finds himself squarely in the middle of a feud raging between the hotel owner and his spoiled daughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights for his life in one of his most awesome adventures as he travels to the sweltering jungles of South America

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is pressed to his unique escape methods after vicious robbers seize millions of dollars in an armored car and take him among their hostages

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Harry sinks into a deep depression after Josie's death. Josie's body holds more questions then answers. Norma's troubled sister, Annie, arrives in Twin Peaks. Wheeler and Audrey hit it off. Cooper's stalemate angers Earle.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Harry is attacked by Jones in his sleep. Audrey and Wheeler begin a relationship. Gordon Cole returns with a report that Windom Earle worked with Major Briggs on Project Bluebook. Cole reinstates Cooper in the FBI.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg casts his family in a movie for a school project.

programme.desc: Macia’s slumber party is cancelled when her principal calls.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria, now in her seventh month, is feeling unattractive. Added to that is the fact that Mike is tutoring an attractive young woman in Economics and suspects that something else might be going on.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Mike argue over the religious upbringing of baby Joey during a Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A mugger tries to attack Archie in his cab ... but this time, Archie strikes back with some pepper spray. So why is Archie the one facing criminal charges?

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Worried when her baby is nine days overdue, Gloria snaps at Mike. Mike tries to be nice to his wife, but then he forgets that her baby shower is scheduled on a day when he has plans.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is a nervous wreck because he wants to back out of the annual minstrel show at the lodge, which he has successfully avoided for several years.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is forced to show up at the hospital for the birth of his grandchild in black face, When his lodge brothers refused to give him their cold cream because he left, He and Edith are surprised to discover that Mike and Gloria haven't arrived

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: In the wake of the birth of little Joey, Gloria and Michael are at odds with one another over communication issues.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie babysits little Joey with the help of his friends during their poker game.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.desc: Alex Trebek guest stars when Iola's crush on the "Jeopardy" game show host turns into a bonanza! Mama accompanies Iola to an audition for the show, but Mama not only becomes the contestant but also wins a trip to Hawaii for the entire family.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Vint and Naomi think about having a baby, Mama decides to show them what it's really like. She babysits a loud child and is tired by the time Vint and Naomi return home.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Iola vie for the presidency of the Church Ladies League in a bitterly contested race.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's boss expects more than she's willing to do for a promotion. When Mama learns of the request, she chases Naomi's boss around until he publicly admits what he asked.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.desc: Al uses Bud's class project to beat out a rival shoe store owner.

programme.desc: As Kelly and her friends trick Bud's fraternity out of their spring break in Florida, Al and Griff join Jefferson in Fort Lauderdale to judge a college co-ed beauty contest.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Nine years after the murders of a mother and her teenage daughters, a wiretapped conversation helps police to crack the case. And the baffling murder of a Virginia woman is solved when human bones are discovered by a geologist in North Carolina.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found shot to death it looks like police may have stumbled upon a multi-party murder plot. And, a wife remains a key suspect in her husband's murder case for six years, until she attempts to prove her own innocence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Years Day 1985, a little boy is left motherless. A family must wait 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: It takes nine years and the work of cutting-edge forensic toxicologists to solve the murder of a medical examiner's wife. Then, a determined Alabama sheriff reopens the case of the deaths of two babies, hoping to get their mother to confess.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: March 1984. Jack Kennedy discovers his daughters brutally murdered. Their mother and niece spend their lives keeping the case alive. DNA leads nowhere. 30 years later, an informant gives up a name.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Oklahoma. DNA points to her killer over a decade later and leads investigators across state lines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Guns found dumped in a pond help police to solve the 15-year-old murder of Detroit cab company owner. And the rape and murder of an Atlanta TV station receptionist goes cold for 20 years before DNA links a man to the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In the heart of Cajun country, young mother Brenda DuPont is found murdered in her home in May 1988. The initial investigation sputters and turns cold, but her sister Linda vows to solve her murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After 19 years, Kansas detectives reopen the case of a banker found beaten to death in his bed--and the chief suspect is his cheating wife. And a man with a guilty conscience helps Arkansas police to crack a cold case of murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Bill Kurtis examines one of the most infamous cold cases in Los Angeles history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Looks at how law enforcers stick with cases for many years, using fresh evidence to win convictions or to free prisoners who were wrongfully jailed. We examine the unsolved murder of Hogan's Heroes star Bob Crane.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In June 1985, a 20-year-old "Sucker Day" Festival Queen is found brutalized. The small community of Nixa, Missouri, is certain her blood is on the hands of a local wealthy businessman, but after 25 years DNA reveals the true killer.

programme.title: Nathan For You

programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este caso internacional de extorsión, asesinato e identidades robadas, el estafador Albert J. Walker asume la identidad del compañero de trabajo, Ronald Platt. Platt luego aparece muerto en un océano con un ancla atada alrededor de su torso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Alianza nefasta
programme.desc: Cuando una joven desapareció, la policía temió que fuera la última víctima de una serie de crímenes similares.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to run background checks on the remaining 5 guys, so she invites their ex-girlfriends to spend a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their exes give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better, so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Final Adios
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final 2 men to pack their bags because they're goin' to Playa Car, Mexico for an exotic getaway!

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to 'own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of 'Tutmania'.

programme.desc: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pit bull.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Caesar works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: European Poker Tour

programme.title: European Poker Tour

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Only 40 players remain in the European Poker Tour Main Event, including reigning champion Simon Wiciak. Can the French pro go back-to-back?

programme.title: Wing Chun
programme.desc: Wing Chun, a talented martial artist, decides to fight against horse thieves in the village to receive respect from the villagers.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Reign Of Assassins
programme.desc: Elusive assassin Drizzle transforms herself into modest shop owner Zeng Jing (Michelle Yeoh) in order to transport the remains of an exalted Buddhist monk to their eternal resting place, but finds her mission unexpectedly complicated.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Legendary action director Yuen Woo Ping draws on a stellar cast (Michelle Yeoh, Dave Bautista, Tony Jaa, and Max Zhang) to create a hard-hitting martial arts blast worthy of its place in the celebrated IP MAN universe.

programme.title: True Legend
programme.desc: Su Qi-Er retired from his life as a renowned Qing dynasty general in order to pursue his dream of a family and his own martial arts school.

programme.title: Hero - Ying Xiong
programme.desc: Acclaimed by critics and loved by audiences around the world, Jet Li, Maggie Cheung, and Donnie Yen star in this Oscar and Golden Globe-nominated action-packed epic, in which a fearless warrior rises up to defy an empire and unite a nation.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: Presented by Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey is the spirited tale of a mysterious and mythical Chinese legend in this exhilarating non-stop martial arts excitement.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: While the teens are discussing the sad possibility that Ernie may have to close down the Youth Center due to financial problems, Jason shows up with an adorable stray dog.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The class project is a time capsule and all our power teens bring something significant to class to share with future generations. Mrs. Appleby contributes a photo of the Power Rangers, which makes Rita immensely jealous.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini is having some difficulties learning the Praying Mantis technique from kung fu expert, Master Lee. He assures her that her technique will improve with time and with some additional practice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When all of the Power Rangers’ parents gather at the Youth Center for Parents Day, Rita seizes the opportunity to create the "Dramole Monster" which traps all the parents in her Dimension of Darkness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy, the Rangers’ only hope, is teleported to the Command Center by Alpha. Zordon reveals that he can restore Tommy's power by draining his own energy and infusing it into Tommy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Billy gets a "B" on a test instead of his usual "A," he fears he will not make The Young Scientists of America club.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Bulk and Skull make a nuisance of themselves by attempting to juggle balls at a party for a group of kids, but Zack manages to scare them off with a pair of rubber snakes. An impressed Angela gives Zack a peck on the cheek.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy volunteer their time at the Youth Center to teach a Karate class to kids. Their teamwork gives Rita the idea for her latest monster, the "Slippery Shark.”

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly helps her insecure younger cousin Kelly try out for the Angel Grove Junior High cheerleading team. Kelly, however, feels that she cannot measure up to her beautiful talented cousin, who is still remembered for being an outstanding cheerleader.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy decides to try out for football but is afraid that he won’t be any good at it since he has never played football before. Ernie, a former football player himself, agrees to help Tommy train at the Juice Bar for his football tryout.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lately, Tommy has been having trouble remembering things. When Mrs. Appleby gives her class an assignment that requires the students to change their biggest faults, the teens decide to help Tommy deal with his forgetfulness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: As Angela's birthday approaches, Zack would like to win her affections again by buying her a pair of pearl earrings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita Repulsa's minions abandon her when an even more evil menace arrives at the Moon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd steals the power of the Zords away from the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers obtain new Zords to defeat Piranhtis Head.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd attacks with a monster that can morph from one Power Ranger into another.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd casts a spell on the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is attacked by the Bloom of Doom, a poisonous plant.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Goldar plans to steal Tommy's Green Ranger powers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers use an unusual defense against a vain monster sent by Lord Zedd.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Stag Beetle Monster drains Tommy's powers in an attack on Angel Grove.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers face Monster Venus Fly Traps as they try to rescue Hallie from Lord Zedd's island stronghold.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is the only one who can save the Rangers from a musical spell.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: A giant Turban Shell captures Tommy and transports him to Zedd's Otherworld.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy attempts to retrieve the Rangers' Morphers and escape from Zedd's Otherworld.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason's guilt about Tommy's loss of power causes even more problems for the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers must toot their own horns to stop Lord Zedd's horrifying Trumpet Top monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is captured and transformed into Lord Zedd's evil queen.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Alpha and Zordon go on a secret mission, leaving the Power Rangers to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zordon introduces the team to the new White Ranger and his mighty White Tiger Zord.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's delight at having his caricature displayed in a famous local landmark dissolves once he sees the unflattering portrait.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The arrival of Daphne's obnoxious brother, Simon, unleashes an emotional torrent that drives her into therapy.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Just when Daphne decides to profess her love for Niles, he drops a stunning bombshell.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Daphne's torn between the man she loves and the man she's engaged to marry.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne flee the wedding altar but soon discover the heavy price to pay for admitting their true love as jilted groom Donny and bitter wife Mel seek revenge.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mel agrees to divorce Niles, but she forbids him to date Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier takes the bus with Roz for the first time, and Frasier uses Martin to meet a woman at a retirement home. Niles and Daphne recreate a date.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier adopts the role of cultural mentor to Todd Peterson, a Silicon Valley billionaire who's just become the station's new owner.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.desc: Defense attorneys for a foster child who killed argue that he was genetically predisposed to violence.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock flies out to Hollywood to defend a beautiful former actress, Catherine Welden, who formed a lucrative cosmetic business only to be accused of murdering an ex-lover who was blackmailing her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben defends a flashy rock star against charges of murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A twisted tale of blackmail and jury tampering tempts Matlock to defend a young law associate unjustly accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: A look at accidents involving controlled flight into terrain.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: A look at the frightening crash of Ethiopian Airlines Flight 409 in 2010; after ruling out terrorists, investigators came to a highly controversial conclusion.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: In 1992, Flight 1862 from Amsterdam to Tel Aviv suffered a catastrophic crash; investigators subsequently discover a lethal problem threatening every 747.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: A look at three commercial planes that became targets over the Sinai Desert, the Sea of Japan and Ukraine.

programme.title: Mayday: Accident Files

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: When a cargo plane crashes in Alabama, investigators must take an unusual approach to determine what happened on board UPS Flight 1354.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: After a private jet slams into an Ohio apartment building, the National Transportation Safety Board uncovers an erratic descent, a puzzling delay, and a tragic perfect storm.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: On July 11, 1991, the crew of Nigeria Airways Flight 2120 unsuccessfully tries to return to the airport after a burst tire creates an in-flight fire which causes 247 Nigerian pilgrims and 14 crew to perish.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: A bomb explodes on Pan Am Flight 103, causing the aircraft to disintegrate in midair and the wreckage of the aircraft to crash into the Scottish town of Lockerbie, killing all 259 people on board and 11 people on the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: With the wreckage lost in the Atlantic Ocean, the crash of Air France Flight 447 in 2009 launched one of the toughest disaster investigations of all time.

programme.title: Mayday: Accident Files

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Two minutes after Scandinavian Airlines Flight 751 leaves Stockholm in 1991, smoke filters through the cabin and both engines fail, one erupting into flames.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
